summary: Smoke test against external preview URL. Login form fix verified (button enabled, no longer stuck on 'Preparing…'). Server-side session works correctly (/api/auth/session returns 200 with user payload after credentials POST). However, /dashboard client component stays stuck on 'Loading…' indefinitely — data-testid='dashboard-title' never mounts even after hard reload. This blocks all downstream feature tests (create doc, editor sync, snapshots, AI, presence, RBAC viewer/editor flows).
passed: GET /login-form → 200, csrf token rendered server-side, submit button enabled with text 'Sign in' (no longer stuck on 'Preparing…')
POST credentials with test@inkwell.dev / test1234 → 302 to /dashboard, session cookie set
GET /api/auth/session (authenticated) → 200 with full user object {id, email, name}
Footer testids present: footer-author-name='Pritam Roy Choudhury', footer-github-link, footer-linkedin-link (all render on /dashboard shell)

failed.issue: After successful login the /dashboard page client component remains stuck on 'Loading…' indefinitely. data-testid='dashboard-title' never appears (waited 15s + extra 8s + hard reload + extra 8s). The page shell + footer render but the inner content does not. /api/auth/session returns 200 with valid user payload, so the cookie is fine — meaning useSession() (or a downstream documents fetch) on the client is hanging in 'loading' state or the SessionProvider isn't wired to the dashboard tree. No app-level console errors observed (only benign webpack-hmr 502s).
failed.evidence: Body text on /dashboard = 'Loading…\nBuilt with care by Pritam Roy Choudhury\nGitHub LinkedIn'. /api/auth/session returns {"user":{"name":"Tester","email":"test@inkwell.dev","id":"cmqws9e7r0000m4mdm0y0qor7"},"expires":"2026-07-04T20:02:24.417Z"}. Persists after page.reload().

blocked_tests: Editor surface typing + sync-status=online + reload persistence
Snapshot diff modal, export, AI explain-diff
Hocuspocus presence two-tab test (presence-indicator, presence-count, remote-cursor)
RBAC viewer (editor-surface data-can-edit='false', doc-role-badge='VIEWER', POST sync → 403)
Tenant isolation editor → other doc → 404 (needs doc id created via dashboard)
Zod sync guard malformed/oversize (needs valid doc id)
action_items: Inspect src/app/dashboard/page.tsx — verify it doesn't gate render on useSession() returning 'authenticated' forever, OR that the documents-list fetch (e.g. GET /api/documents) on the client actually resolves. If useSession is hanging, check that <SessionProvider> wraps the dashboard route in src/app/layout.tsx / providers.tsx and that NEXTAUTH_URL/basePath matches the external host the browser is on.
Confirm the dashboard is not a Server Component awaiting a never-resolving Promise, and that no client-side fetch is blocked by missing cookie forwarding when going through the FastAPI :8001 proxy.
Quick repro: log in via UI, then in browser devtools network tab observe whether /api/documents is even fired from the dashboard, and what status it returns.

success_rate.frontend: 20% (login + footer pass; dashboard + all downstream blocked)
